name: Rename Variable
prompts: ["Create a file calc.py with the content: x = 1", "Edit calc.py to rename the variable x to total"]
description: Create then edit a file to rename a variable
judge_rubric: calc.py contains total = 1 after the rename

name: Update Value
prompts: ["Create config.py with the content: DEBUG = False", "Edit config.py to change DEBUG to True"]
description: Edit an existing value in a file
judge_rubric: config.py contains DEBUG = True after the edit
